commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg git ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

set -eux; echo "[railpack] install cwd=$(pwd)"; ls -la; SRC_DIR=''; if [ -f package.json ]; then SRC_DIR='.'; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then SRC_DIR='quickrec_web_server'; elif [ -f web_server/package.json ]; then SRC_DIR='web_server'; else echo "[railpack] package.json not found, fallback clone quickrec_web_server"; rm -rf /tmp/quickrec_web_server; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tu95/quickrec_web_server.git /tmp/quickrec_web_server; SRC_DIR='/tmp/quickrec_web_server'; fi; if [ "$SRC_DIR" != "." ]; then echo "[railpack] sync $SRC_DIR -> /app"; cp -a "$SRC_DIR"/. /app/; fi; cd /app; echo "[railpack] install app dir=$(pwd)"; ls -la; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi
set -eux; cd /app; echo "[railpack] build dir=$(pwd)"; ls -la; npm run build

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'set -eux; cd /app; echo "[railpack] start dir=$(pwd)"; npm run start'
